title: I am having a mental breakdown
description: Port of my original mental breakdown pack from PMC :)
body:
[Port of my original from PMC!]

The most random and generally confusing pack I have ever made, and yes, the totem is an anime girl.

﻿All the changes are in the main picture cause of how little I changed.

﻿Yeah I don't know why I did this..

[see third line] Guess the moderators want me to explain what I did anyway so here goes;
Music discs are anime girls
totem is anime girl
sword is big and long
redstone? well its smooth now.
extra blue elytra
ur axe has a blade
trident look all fancy and shiii

You're welcome, moderators :)



[​Fixed﻿ broken pixel on netherite sword]
